evals.prompt: I want to enrich leads in real-time when they fill out a form on our website. We're not using HubSpot — we have a custom Node.js backend. How do I set up Clearbit enrichment?
evals.expected_output: Guide covering API key setup, Combined streaming endpoint for real-time enrichment, handling the JSON response to extract person and company data, and mapping key fields to the backend database

assertions.name: streaming_endpoint
assertions.description: Must recommend the streaming endpoint (person-stream.clearbit.com) for real-time use rather than standard async endpoint

assertions.name: combined_endpoint
assertions.description: Must mention the combined/find endpoint that returns both person and company data in a single call

assertions.name: auth_setup
assertions.description: Must explain HTTP Basic Auth with API key as username (or Bearer token) and show how to make the request from Node.js

evals.prompt: We want to identify which target accounts are visiting our pricing page so our sales team can follow up. How does Clearbit Reveal work and how do we set it up?
evals.expected_output: Guide covering Reveal API IP-to-company matching, JavaScript tag setup, expected match rates, combining with Prospector to find contacts, and alert configuration

assertions.name: reveal_endpoint
assertions.description: Must describe the Reveal API endpoint (reveal.clearbit.com/v1/companies/find) and explain it identifies companies from IP addresses, not individual people

assertions.name: match_rate_expectations
assertions.description: Must set expectations that Reveal matches 20-30% of traffic (business IPs only — residential, VPN, mobile won't match)

assertions.name: prospector_complement
assertions.description: Must recommend combining Reveal with Prospector or another tool to find specific contacts at the identified company

evals.prompt: We're on HubSpot Professional and considering Breeze Intelligence for lead enrichment. Is it worth the cost compared to using the Clearbit API directly? What are the trade-offs?
evals.expected_output: Comparison of Breeze Intelligence vs standalone Clearbit API covering pricing, credit system, auto-enrichment convenience, HubSpot lock-in, and feature differences

assertions.name: credit_system
assertions.description: Must explain the Breeze Intelligence credit system (100/1K/10K tiers, monthly reset, no rollover) and compare to API-based pricing

assertions.name: hubspot_lockin
assertions.description: Must mention that Breeze Intelligence requires a paid HubSpot subscription and is not available for non-HubSpot CRM users

assertions.name: convenience_tradeoffs
assertions.description: Must discuss the convenience of auto-enrichment and form shortening built into HubSpot vs the flexibility and potential cost savings of the standalone API
